title: UTILITY ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: BEND OFFICE UTILITY ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists with past-due electric, natural gas, and heating fuel (propane, wood, oil, pellets) bills. Helps with enrolling in the water discount program. Assistance is not guaranteed and is dependent on funding availability. 20310 Empire Avenue Suite A100 Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Households at 60% or below of State Median Income Water discount program: City of Bend customer Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (541) 548-2380 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 548-2380 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Social Security numbers for all household members that have one and ID for anyone over age 18 (e.g., drivers license/state ID card, a letter with the person's name and address on it). For electric/gas/water assistance, a copy of the bill is preferred but some individuals may be able to receive assistance without one on a case-by-case basis. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Crook, Deschutes, and Jefferson Counties and the Confederated Tribes of Warm Springs Water discount: City of Bend SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-4:30pm Services: Discounted Water Service Electric Service Payment Assistance Gas Service Payment Assistance Heating Fuel Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - CENTRAL OREGON’S COORDINATED ENTRY SYSTEM HOUSING/SHELTER - EMERGENCY SHELTER HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMESOURCE HOUSING/SHELTER - RENT ASSISTANCE HOUSING/SHELTER - WEATHERIZATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - LENDING MONEY MANAGEMENT - REPRESENTATIVE PAYEE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BEND OFFICE
